recommendation: Importlaag is traceerbaar en idempotent; definitieve productie-import blijft geblokkeerd totdat vatMode mappings expliciet zijn en duplicate EAN brondata is beoordeeld.

productionGuard.message: Refused unknown vatMode before creating batches

catalogImportWithoutOverride.message: Refused unknown vatMode before creating batches

build.buildWarning: Lokale Node 25 wordt door Vercel Serverless naar Node 24 vertaald; build is geslaagd.

fixes.change: Added previewRows, committedAt, failedAt, errorMessage, importKey/sourceKey row fields, and audit indexes for rowKind and sourceFile/sourceColumn.
fixes.reason: Batches and rows needed complete lifecycle and lookup metadata for auditable production imports.
fixes.effect: New imports can be traced by batch, row kind, source key and commit/failure state.

fixes.change: Added failPreviewBatch, committedAt handling, row importKey/sourceKey persistence and runtime failure status handling; fixed unknownVatModeRows double counting.
fixes.reason: A failed import should leave an explicit failed batch and preview counters should not be incremented again during commit.
fixes.effect: Future script failures are visible in Convex and latest-run batch counters now match preview row counters.

fixes.change: Encoded raw Excel objects with non-ASCII column names as key/value entries before sending to Convex; wrapped per-file processing in failPreviewBatch handling.
fixes.reason: Convex rejects object field names containing characters such as euro signs and superscript 2 from Excel headers.
fixes.effect: Rows with columns like Adviesverkoopprijs euro/m2 remain auditbaar and imports no longer crash on raw headers.

fixes.change: Disabled legacy direct import unless explicitly confirmed by a private flag.
fixes.reason: Production imports must always use productImportBatches and productImportRows.
fixes.effect: The normal script surface no longer bypasses audit rows.

fixes.change: Exposed previewRows, committedAt, failedAt and errorMessage in portal import views.
fixes.reason: The portal must display real Convex lifecycle/counter data, not opaque status.
fixes.effect: Import pages show actual Convex batch lifecycle data.

openRisks: 12984 prijsregels hebben vatMode=unknown in de dev baseline; productie-commit zonder override weigert dit terecht.
25 supplier+EAN duplicate groepen bestaan in de brondata; import dedupet bewust niet alleen op EAN om verkeerde productmerges te voorkomen.
2260 duplicate price-rule identity groepen blijven bestaan als Headlam/source-row historie; duplicate sourceKey is 0, dus dit is traceerbaar maar moet zakelijk worden bevestigd.
De audit-query leest circa 13,8 MB uit Convex en is geschikt als beheer/audittool, niet als hoogfrequente UI-query.
